summary: Rewrote README.md and SKILL.md authentication sections to surface MAILCHIMP_API_KEY as the canonical env var, plus added a Known Limitations block documenting 3 upstream Mailchimp API quirks.
reason: The generator emitted MAILCHIMP_USERNAME / MAILCHIMP_PASSWORD as separate env vars from the spec's basicAuth scheme. Mailchimp's real-world convention is one combined env var with the datacenter suffix. README + SKILL updates: (a) point at MAILCHIMP_API_KEY in install instructions, env var table, troubleshooting, and the Authentication section, (b) document MAILCHIMP_DC as the OAuth-token override, (c) add a 'Known Limitations' block surfacing 3 Mailchimp API quirks discovered during live dogfood (file-manager and sms-campaigns content return 200 with default content for invalid IDs; workflow archive --json emits NDJSON event stream).
